The '''5DS Ebranite Relations Droid''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] developed by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] to work with [[Ebranite]] individuals.

5DS droids were developed based on [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droids]]. Their most notable feature was that 5DS's included extra limbs and a stouter torso to resemble six-armed Ebranites

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] made use of 5DS droids when they invaded [[Ebra]].

Rebel operative [[Rith Tar'ak]], an [[Ebranite]] herself and a recruiter on Ebra, was assigned a 5DS droid, [[A-5DS]] to help her with her task.
